label: Debug tab menu
description: Registers a tab in the in-game debug window (Dialog_Debug). The menuClass names the C# class that implements the tab; displayOrder controls its position in the tab bar.

menuClass.label: Menu class
menuClass.description: C# class that implements this debug tab. Must derive from LudeonTK.DebugTabMenu. Omitting this field causes a config error at runtime.

displayOrder.label: Display order
displayOrder.description: Sort order of this tab in Dialog_Debug. Lower values appear first. Defaults to 99999. Shipped values use multiples of 100 to leave room for mod entries between vanilla tabs.

new-debug-tab-menu.label: New debug tab menu
new-debug-tab-menu.description: A new debug window tab with a menu class and display order.
